sentence: 警察迅速控制住了那几名暴徒。
pinyin: Jǐngchá xùnsù kòngzhì zhù le nà jǐ míng bàotú.
english: The police quickly brought those several thugs under control.

meaning: 1. target; 2. aim; 3. objective; 4. what one hopes to gain
sentence: 这笔合同的标的是一批进口设备。
pinyin: Zhè bǐ hétong de biāodì shì yī pī jìnkǒu shèbèi.
english: The object of this contract is a batch of imported equipment.

sentence: 他在大学主修史学，对古代很感兴趣。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué zhǔxiū shǐxué, duì gǔdài hěn gǎn xìngqù.
english: He majored in historiography at university and is very interested in antiquity.

sentence: 我下班后顺路去超级市场买了蔬菜。
pinyin: Wǒ xiàbān hòu shùnlù qù chāojí shìchǎng mǎi le shūcài.
english: After work I stopped by the supermarket on the way and bought some vegetables.

sentence: 电脑死机了，只好重启一下。
pinyin: Diànnǎo sǐjī le, zhǐhǎo chóngqǐ yīxià.
english: The computer froze, so I had no choice but to restart it.
